title: helictotrichon neumayerianum
intro: Helictotrichon neumayerianum, also known as Blue Oat Grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the nervous system and act as a diuretic, which can help to relieve conditions such as arthritis and gout. The health benefits of Helictotrichon neumayerianum include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through the extraction of its essential oils, which can be used in topical applications, or through the preparation of teas and infusions.
